tweets.text:
Joe Biden’s Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Becerra has no answers for why migrant child sponsors are listing strip clubs as home addresses

This guy is running to be Governor of California…

A little first was forced into prostitution by someone who claimed to be “her aunt” but obviously had no relation. The Biden Admin did no checks

I looked a lot into this 

 “Pimped out by their aunt” testimony from a child who said they were being prostituted by someone presented as their “aunt” who was not actually related and unknown to the child before arrival in the US

Some children ran away from sponsors because they were being sold for sex

Office of Refugee Resettlement  placed a teenage girl in a house full of unknown adult males with no private bedroom for her.

Sponsors used a strip club and other non-residential locations like empty lots, shipping container fields, or open fields as the listed address for child placement. 

“Shipping container fields”…. Isn’t that interesting….

Case managers reported being discouraged by the Biden Admin from thoroughly checking addresses with pressure to release children quickly

Not a single Democrat has been held accountable for this
